name: @aily-project/lib-sparkfun-5p49v60
author: SparkFun
description: SparkFun Clock Generator 5P49V60 Blockly 库，支持 I2C 配置 VCO 频率、四路时钟输出频率、输出模式和相位偏移。
description_zh_cn: SparkFun Clock Generator 5P49V60 Blockly 库，支持 I2C 配置 VCO 频率、四路时钟输出频率、输出模式和相位偏移。
description_en: Blockly wrapper for the SparkFun 5P49V60 programmable clock generator.
